entries.author: amit
entries.html:
Where I'm at

Cleaning up the invoice/billing summary page that got pushed into Dialpad beta, and pushing back on a batch of AI-generated invoice emails before they reach customers.

Green

  • Billing summary cleanup is in Design Studio — expand-all / collapse-all working, aligned to our patterns.
  • Four PRs from last week are through QA; fixing the bits that came back.

Concerns

  • Invoice vs. Details — we have two near-identical heavy pages and I still can't get a straight answer on why. A summary should be a quick glance; the full bill is a separate thing. Trying to settle the strategy before touching code.
  • Engineering bandwidth — nine of ten engineers are on customer/migration work, so net-new billing functionality is effectively stalled this quarter.

Red flags

  • AI-generated emails shipping to customers — the new invoice emails have JavaScript and CSS classes that will never render in an email client, and they're off-brand. This can't go out as-is. I've written up exactly what's wrong and how email HTML should be done. Need us to agree it doesn't ship until it's fixed.

Point of view

  • On the NetSuite invoice Vincent wants changed: it was approved, it's an established pattern customers already receive, and it's clean for a printed PDF. I'd standardize on it and roll tweaks across the board rather than rebuild a one-off. Writing this down so I hold the line in the call instead of getting argued out of it.
